description: The scope of work consists of structurally renovating an existing convenience store building, renovating the pump island fascias, and installing new signage. The existing building will be about 50% partially demolished by removing the existing roof framing and some interior non-load-bearing walls. An addition to increase the Convenience Store sales area will be constructed on the left side of the building and a new corrugated metal roof will be constructed. The existing CMU walls will remain in place. A knee wall will be built to raise the ceiling height from 9 feet to 14 feet. The old shed building on the left side will be removed to allow for the addition to the existing Convenience Store. New landscaping and sidewalk repair is proposed. Existing fuel pumps will remain. No new pumps will be installed. The owner is only painting the columns and repairing the canopy ceilings and replacing the fascia with new metal panels and new signage.

description: Remove two-story portion of building and replace with a wall and gate securing the site.

THE INTENT OF THIS PROJECT IS TO PERFORM INTERIOR AND EXTERIOR REPAIRS RESULTING FROM A COMBINATION OF FOUNDATION AND ENVELOPE ISSUES. THE SCOPE OF WORK INCLUDES: PILE REPAIR o REPAIR OF COMPRIMISED PILES CONCENTRATED IN THE NORTHEAST CORNER OF THE BUILDING STAIR TOWER REPAIR o STRUCTURAL AND ENVELOPE REPAIRS TO THE NORTHEAST STAIR TOWER ADDITION TO THE ORIGINAL BUILDING MADE NECESSARY BY DIFFERENTIAL SETTLEMENT ASSOCIATED WITH PILE DAMAGE PARTIAL ENVELOPE REPLACEMENT o REMOVAL AND REPLACEMENT OF ARCHITECTURAL MOULDED CONCRETE TRIMS, METAL PANELS, AND SOME MASONRY AND GLASS BLOCK COMPONENTS DUE TO WATER INFILTRATION AND LACK OF EXPANSION CONTROL BETWEEN THE ORIGINAL STRUCTURE AND PRIOR ADDITIONS ENCLOSURE OF THE COURTYARD COVERED PORCH o REDUCE THE SIZE OF THE COURTYARD. THE COVERED PORCH WAS ORIGINALLY AN INTERIOR SPACE, THE SLAB INSIDE AND OUT IS AT THE SAME LEVEL WHICH HAS CAUSE SIGNIFICANT DAMAGES TO INTERIOR FINISHES DUE TO SPLASH BACK AND FLOODING MISCELLANEOUS EXTERIOR ENVELOPE REPAIRS o CLOSURE OF MISCELLANEOUS PENETRATIONS o REPAIR OF BROKEN MASONRY UNITS AND MORTAR o MASONRY SEALING o WINDOWSILL REPAIRS INTERIOR FINISH AND FIXTURE REPAIRS/REPALACEMENT o REPLACEMENT OF WALL BOARD AFFECTED BY MOISTURE INFILTRATION o REPLACEMENT OF AGEING PLUMBING FIXTURES IN SITU MECHANICAL EQUIPMENT REPLACEMENT o REPLACEMENT OF FAILED OUTSIDE AIR UNIT o EXHAUST SYSTEM REPAIRS o MISCELLANEOUS REPAIRS TO VRF

description: Prep suite for future tenant white box turn over-- Scope or work includes: • 1st Floor: o Complete interior demolition and removal of finishes on 1st floor except restrooms, janitor closet and electrical panels. o Removal of existing ATM and replacement of French doors (already reviewed by VCC Ref # HG784Y). o Prep suite for future tenant white box turn over. o Existing HVAC, electrical and sprinkler system to be modified for reduced layout. • 2nd Floor: o Complete interior demolition and removal of finishes on 2nd floor. o Prep suite for future tenant white box turn over. o Build new ADA restrooms (new ACT ceiling and ADA plumbing fixtures). o Build 2-hour demising wall. o Install new roof access ladder and hatch. o Existing HVAC, electrical and sprinkler system to be modified for reduced layout. • Roof: o Remove portions of existing ductwork. o Install new condensing unit. o Install new roof access hatch.
